children.heading: .—Failure To Maintain Qualifications or To Comply
children.label: a .—Failure To Maintain Qualifications or To Comply

children.text: is not qualified to provide intermediary services; or
willfully failed to comply with a provision of this part or with an order or regulation of the Commission.

children.heading: .—Failure To Maintain Bond, Proof of Insurance, or Other Surety
children.label: b .—Failure To Maintain Bond, Proof of Insurance, or Other Surety
children.text: The Commission may revoke an ocean transportation intermediary’s license for failure to maintain a bond, proof of insurance, or other surety as required by .section 40902(a) of this title
